releaseNotes: 0.4.0 — Ship the bundle as a Claude Code plugin marketplace. Claude Code / Cowork users can now install ALL skills with two commands (`/plugin marketplace add quantotechnologylabs/quantobooks-skills` then `/plugin install quantobooks@quantobooks`) instead of copying skills one by one; skills appear namespaced as `quantobooks:quanto-*` and update via `/plugin update`. The curl/npx loose-file installer still works for `~/.claude/skills/`. Claude Desktop does NOT support custom plugin marketplaces or filesystem skill folders today — the installer no longer pretends to install there; use the in-app Skills uploader or the downloadable zip instead. 0.3.0 — Prefix every skill with `quanto-` so QuantoBooks skills stay identifiable when users have many skills installed from different sources. Directory names + YAML `name:` frontmatter + all cross-skill references updated. NOTE: if you were installed at v0.2.0, the old unprefixed directories will be left behind in your skills folder — re-run the installer to clean them up (or delete the unprefixed copies by hand). 0.2.0 — Karbon practice-management context. The foundation guard (quanto-client-context) now documents the karbon_* tool tier (client profile, work items, notes, note comments) as an optional, read-only context source for mapped clients. quanto-client-onboarding-review, quanto-document-lookup, quanto-flag-triage, quanto-management-report, and quanto-month-end-close gained conditional Karbon steps so they fold in client profile / engagement / relationship context when present. All additive and best-effort — skills skip Karbon silently when a client isn't mapped. 0.1.0 — Initial skill bundle: foundation client-context guard + 13 workflow skills.
